Protected Forever.

Decentralized asset inheritance secured by smart contracts and zero-knowledge encryption. Built for the future of finance.

Read Specifications
AES-256-GCM IPFS Storage Polygon Network
Security Protocol

Battle-Tested Architecture

Zero Trust Architecture

End-to-end encryption with zero-knowledge proofs ensuring privacy remains absolute. Servers never see plaintext.

Shamir Secret Sharing

Distributed key security via advanced secret sharing protocols across decentralized nodes. No single point of failure.

Automated Execution

Precision-engineered heartbeat smart contracts trigger asset transfer automatically upon verification of life decay.

Secure Your Future Today

Join over 12,000 users who trust DeadMan Protocol to secure their multi-generational wealth on-chain.
